mapper.select: SELECT r.resource_type , r.database_name , r.schema_name , r.table_name , r.column_name , p.can_select, p.can_update, p.can_delete, p.can_insert, p.can_drop, p.can_merge, p.can_create, p.can_alter, p.can_create_index, p.can_drop_index, p.can_referenced, p.can_add, p.can_add_partition, p.can_analyze FROM uc_role ur LEFT JOIN permission p on ur.role_id = p.role_id and p.deleted = false LEFT JOIN resource r on r.id = p.resource_id and r.deleted = false where ur.deleted = false and ur.uc_id = #{userId} and r.database_connect_id = #{databaseConnectId}

SELECT r.resource_type , r.database_name , r.schema_name , r.table_name , r.column_name , p.can_select, p.can_update, p.can_delete, p.can_insert, p.can_drop, p.can_merge, p.can_create, p.can_alter, p.can_create_index, p.can_drop_index, p.can_referenced, p.can_add, p.can_add_partition, p.can_analyze FROM uc_role ur LEFT JOIN permission p on ur.role_id = p.role_id and p.deleted = false LEFT JOIN resource r on r.id = p.resource_id and r.deleted = false where ur.deleted = false and p.deleted = false and ur.uc_id = #{userId} and r.database_connect_id = #{connectId}
and p.can_select= true
and p.can_update= true
and p.can_delete= true
and p.can_insert= true
and p.can_drop= true
and p.can_merge= true
and p.can_create= true
and p.can_alter= true
and p.can_create_index= true
and p.can_drop_index= true
and p.can_referenced= true
and p.can_add= true
and p.can_add_partition= true
and p.can_analyze= true

SELECT r.id AS id, r.database_connect_id AS connectId, r.database_name as dbName, r.schema_name as schemaName, #{nodeName} as parentName,
r.database_name AS name,
r.schema_name AS name,
r.table_name AS name,
r.column_name AS name,
r.resource_type AS type, c.db_type AS dbType FROM resource r left join database_connect_config c on c.id = r.database_connect_id WHERE r.deleted = false and r.database_connect_id = #{connectId} AND r.resource_type =#{resourceType}
AND r.database_name = #{nodeName}
AND (r.database_name = #{nodeName} or r.schema_name = #{nodeName})
AND r.table_name = #{nodeName} AND r.column_name != '*'

SELECT DISTINCT r.id AS id, r.database_connect_id AS connectId, c.name AS connectName, r.database_name as dbName, r.schema_name as schemaName, #{nodeName} as parentName,
r.database_name AS name,
r.schema_name AS name,
r.table_name AS name,
r.column_name AS name,
r.resource_type AS type, c.db_type AS dbType FROM uc_role ur LEFT JOIN permission p ON ur.role_id = p.role_id left join resource r on p.resource_id = r.id left join database_connect_config c on c.id = r.database_connect_id WHERE r.deleted = false and p.deleted = false and ur.uc_id =#{userId} AND r.resource_type =#{resourceType} and r.database_connect_id = #{connectId} and p.can_select= true
AND r.database_name = #{nodeName}
AND (r.database_name = #{nodeName} or r.schema_name = #{nodeName})
AND r.table_name = #{nodeName} AND r.column_name != '*'

select DISTINCT r.id, r.database_connect_id as connectId, r.resource_type AS type, c.name as connectName, r.database_name as dbName, r.schema_name as schemaName, c.db_type AS dbType, case when resource_type = 'CONNECTION' then c.name when resource_type = 'DATABASE' then r.database_name when resource_type = 'SCHEMA' then r.schema_name when resource_type = 'TABLE' then r.table_name when resource_type = 'COLUMN' then r.column_name else null end as name from uc_role ur left join permission p on ur.role_id = p.role_id left join resource r on p.resource_id = r.id left join database_connect_config c on c.id = r.database_connect_id WHERE r.deleted = false and p.deleted = false and ur.uc_id =#{userId} AND r.id = #{id}

choose.when:
select r2.id from resource r1 inner join resource r2 on r2.database_connect_id = r1.database_connect_id where r1.id = #{id} and r2.deleted = false and r2.resource_type in ('DATABASE', 'SCHEMA', 'TABLE', 'COLUMN')
union all
select r2.id from resource r1 inner join resource r2 on r2.database_connect_id = r1.database_connect_id where r2.id = #{id} and r1.id != #{id} and r2.deleted = false and r2.resource_type in ('DATABASE', 'SCHEMA', 'TABLE', 'COLUMN')

select r2.id from resource r1 inner join resource r2 on r2.database_connect_id = r1.database_connect_id where r1.id = #{id} and r2.deleted = false and r2.resource_type in ('SCHEMA', 'TABLE', 'COLUMN') and r2.database_name = r1.database_name union all select r2.id from resource r1 inner join resource r2 on r2.database_connect_id = r1.database_connect_id where r2.id = #{id} and r1.id != #{id} and r2.deleted = false and r2.resource_type in ('SCHEMA', 'TABLE', 'COLUMN') and r2.database_name = r1.database_name

select r2.id from resource r1 inner join resource r2 on r2.database_connect_id = r1.database_connect_id where r1.id = #{id} and r2.deleted = false and r2.resource_type in ('TABLE', 'COLUMN') and r2.database_name = r1.database_name and (r2.schema_name IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r1.schema_name) union all select r2.id from resource r1 inner join resource r2 on r2.database_connect_id = r1.database_connect_id where r2.id = #{id} and r1.id != #{id} and r2.deleted = false and r2.resource_type in ('TABLE', 'COLUMN') and r2.database_name = r1.database_name and (r2.schema_name IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r1.schema_name)

select r2.id from resource r1 inner join resource r2 on r2.database_connect_id = r1.database_connect_id where r1.id = #{id} and r2.deleted = false and r2.resource_type = 'COLUMN' and r2.database_name = r1.database_name and (r2.schema_name IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r1.schema_name) and r2.table_name = r1.table_name
union all
select r2.id from resource r1 inner join resource r2 on r2.database_connect_id = r1.database_connect_id where r2.id = #{id} and r1.id != #{id} and r2.deleted = false and r2.resource_type = 'COLUMN' and r2.database_name = r1.database_name and (r2.schema_name IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r1.schema_name) and r2.table_name = r1.table_name

mapper.select: SELECT r.database_connect_id AS id, r.database_connect_id AS connectId, dcc.name, dcc.db_type, r.resource_type AS type, COALESCE(p.can_select, false) as can_select, COALESCE(p.can_update, false) as can_update, COALESCE(p.can_delete, false) as can_delete, COALESCE(p.can_insert, false) as can_insert, COALESCE(p.can_drop, false) as can_drop, COALESCE(p.can_merge, false) as can_merge, COALESCE(p.can_create, false) as can_create, COALESCE(p.can_alter, false) as can_alter, COALESCE(p.can_create_index, false) as can_create_index, COALESCE(p.can_drop_index, false) as can_drop_index, COALESCE(p.can_referenced, false) as can_referenced, COALESCE(p.can_add, false) as can_add, COALESCE(p.can_add_partition, false) as can_add_partition, COALESCE(p.can_analyze, false) as can_analyze, COALESCE(p.allow, false) as allow FROM resource r LEFT JOIN permission p on p.resource_id = r.id and p.role_id = #{roleId} and p.deleted = false LEFT JOIN database_connect_config dcc on r.database_connect_id = dcc.id WHERE r.deleted = false AND r.resource_type = #{resourceType}

choose.when: select r2.id from resource r1 inner join resource r2 on r2.database_connect_id = r1.database_connect_id and r2.deleted = false and r2.resource_type = 'CONNECTION' where r1.id = #{id}

mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT r.id AS id, r.database_connect_id AS connectId, c.name AS connectName, r.database_name as dbName, r.schema_name as schemaName, CASE WHEN r.resource_type = 'DATABASE' THEN r.database_name WHEN r.resource_type = 'SCHEMA' THEN r.schema_name WHEN r.resource_type = 'TABLE' THEN r.table_name WHEN r.resource_type = 'COLUMN' THEN r.column_name END AS name, CASE WHEN r.resource_type = 'DATABASE' THEN c.name WHEN r.resource_type = 'SCHEMA' THEN r.database_name WHEN r.resource_type = 'SCHEMA' THEN NULLIF(r.schema_name, r.database_name) WHEN r.resource_type = 'COLUMN' THEN r.table_name END AS parentName, r.resource_type AS type, c.db_type AS dbType FROM uc_role ur LEFT JOIN permission p ON ur.role_id = p.role_id left join resource r on p.resource_id = r.id left join database_connect_config c on c.id = r.database_connect_id WHERE r.deleted = false and p.deleted = false and ur.uc_id =#{userId} and r.database_connect_id = #{connectId} and p.can_select= true and r.resource_type != 'CONNECTION'

SELECT r.column_name AS name, r.table_name AS tableName, r.data_type AS type, r.description_ai AS description FROM uc_role ur LEFT JOIN permission p ON ur.role_id = p.role_id LEFT JOIN resource r ON p.resource_id = r.id LEFT JOIN database_connect_config dcc on r.database_connect_id = dcc.id WHERE r.deleted = false and p.deleted = false AND r.database_connect_id = #{connectId} AND ur.uc_id = #{userId} AND r.resource_type = 'COLUMN'
#{tableName}
